title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: edk2 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for edk2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.

fixes.description: [edk2,rhel-10.1] fix typo in fwcfg file name

[aarch64][EDK2] UEFI writable variable service in QEMU

full_text:
An update for edk2 is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

For detailed information on changes in this release, see the Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10 Release Notes linked from the References section.
